name: PULMATRIX INC.  DL-,0001
summary: Pulmatrix, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing inhaled therapies to prevent and treat respiratory diseases using its iSPERSE technology. The company's pipeline includes products targeting severe asthma, allergic bronchopulmonary aspergillosis, and other lung diseases. Pulmatrix is headquartered in Lexington, Massachusetts.
